script:
set +e
echo '=== last 15 RC entries in debug.log ==='
grep -E '^RC:' /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null | tail -15
echo '=== last 30 lines around recent claude session in debug.log ==='
tail -200 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-debug.log 2>/dev/null | grep -B1 -A8 '(claude)' | tail -80
echo '=== last 30 errors ==='
tail -30 /home/azureuser/.mskai-bot/responder-errors.log 2>/dev/null
echo '=== try claude binary directly with absolute path ==='
sudo -u azureuser bash -c 'echo hi | /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude -p --model claude-opus-4-7 --max-turns 1 --output-format text 2>&1' | head -40
echo '=== claude binary version + creds check ==='
sudo -u azureuser bash -c '/home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude --version 2>&1; ls -la /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1 | head -3' 2>&1 | head -10
echo '===END==='
